title: Hydropower MRV Policy Schema
description: Guardian-compatible schema definition for hydropower MRV under CDM ACM0002 — Consolidated Baseline Methodology for Grid-Connected Electricity Generation from Renewable Sources

policyInfo.name: Hydropower MRV Policy (ACM0002)
policyInfo.description: Guardian implementation of CDM ACM0002 for grid-connected hydroelectric power generation with Hedera HCS telemetry anchoring and CER token minting
policyInfo.topicDescription: Hydropower carbon emission reduction monitoring and verification

schemas.name: Project Description
schemas.description: Project registration document submitted by Project Participant. Captures plant specifications, location, baseline emission factor, and additionality demonstration.

projectName.description: Official name of the hydropower project

plantLocation.description: GPS coordinates of the power plant

installedCapacityMW.description: Total installed generation capacity in megawatts (MW)

gridConnectionPoint.description: Name or ID of the grid substation where the plant connects

baselineEmissionFactor.description: Combined margin grid emission factor in tCO2e/MWh

commercialOperationDate.description: Date the plant commenced commercial operation (ISO 8601)

projectParticipantDID.description: Hedera DID of the Project Participant

additionalityJustification.description: Narrative justification of project additionality per CDM Tool 01/02

schemas.name: Monitoring Report
schemas.description: Periodic monitoring data submitted by Project Participant. Contains generation telemetry, hydro-specific parameters, and calculated emission reductions for the monitoring period.

monitoringPeriodStart.description: Start date of the monitoring period (ISO 8601)

monitoringPeriodEnd.description: End date of the monitoring period (ISO 8601)

grossGenerationMWh.description: Total gross electricity generated during the period (MWh)

netGenerationMWh.description: Net electricity supplied to grid (gross minus auxiliary consumption) (MWh)

auxiliaryConsumptionMWh.description: Auxiliary electricity consumption by plant equipment (MWh)

averageFlowRate.description: Average water flow rate through turbines during period (m³/s)

averageHeadHeight.description: Average effective hydraulic head height during period (m)

capacityFactor.description: Capacity factor for the period (actual output / rated capacity × 100)

hcsTopicId.description: Hedera Consensus Service topic ID where telemetry was anchored

merkleRootHash.description: Merkle root hash of the batched telemetry messages for this period

schemas.name: Hydropower Telemetry
schemas.description: Device-level real-time telemetry submitted per measurement interval. Anchored to Hedera HCS. Schema UUID matches on-chain registration (HCS message #12 during policy publication).

gatewayDID.description: Hedera DID of the gateway/turbine controller device

signature.description: Ed25519 digital signature over payload (base64 encoded)

nonce.description: Unique nonce for replay attack protection

hcsMessageId.description: Hedera HCS message sequence number for this telemetry record

merkleProof.description: Merkle proof path for batch-anchored telemetry (optional for Merkle mode)

schemas.name: VVB Attestation
schemas.description: Formal verification statement issued by the VVB after reviewing a Monitoring Report. Records findings, compliance status, and approve/reject decision.

monitoringReportRef.description: Reference ID or hash of the Monitoring Report being attested

vvbName.description: Name of the Verification and Validation Body

findings.description: Narrative summary of VVB findings and any discrepancies identified

verifiedEmissionReductions.description: VVB-verified net emission reductions (tCO2e) — may differ from PP submission

conditions.description: Conditions attached to approval (if decision is Approved with Conditions)

token.name: Carbon Emission Reduction (CER)
token.mintingTrigger: SR approval of VVB-verified Monitoring Report

hederaAnchoring.schemaIPFS: See IPFS CID in HCS message #12 on topic anchored during policy publication
